name: Israeli Moroccan Couscous
intro: The vegetables can be cubed but will take longer to cook.

ingredients.item: (15 ounces) of can garbanzo beans, drained

method: Heat oil in a large pot over medium-high heat; saute onion until golden. Pour in vegetable broth and bring to a boil. Stir in carrots, turnips, and sweet potato. Reduce heat to medium and simmer 15 minutes.
Stir in garbanzo beans, tomato sauce, cinnamon, turmeric, saffron, and curry powder. Simmer until heated through.
Meanwhile, bring 2 1/2 cups of water to a boil. Stir in couscous, cover, and remove from heat. Let stand 5 to 7 minutes. Fluff with a fork and serve with vegetables on top.
